title: Two-Dimensional HCAI Framework
description: A visual representation of the Human-Centred AI framework showing the balance between Automation and Human Control on one axis, and the spectrum from Enhancing to Replacing human activity on the other.
relationships: The vertical axis represents the degree of Automation (top) vs Human Control (bottom)
The horizontal axis represents the system's goal, from Replacing human activity (left) to Enhancing it (right)
The four quadrants are created by the intersection of these two axes, each representing a different AI design paradigm
